## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] This change is roadmap-aligned.
- [ ] This change improves the self-hostable Benkyou learning workspace.
- [ ] This change avoids hosted-only business operations, billing, private
      infrastructure, internal analytics, and admin tooling.
- [ ] I opened or linked a discussion/issue for major feature, schema, auth, AI
      pipeline, provider, API, or redesign work.

## Checks

- [ ] I ran the narrowest useful checks for this change.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm check` when touching TypeScript, UI, or config.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm check-types` when touching TypeScript contracts or package
      boundaries.
- [ ] I ran tests relevant to this change.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm build` for release-sensitive or infrastructure changes.

## UI

- [ ] I included screenshots or a short recording for visible UI changes.
- [ ] I checked mobile, tablet, and desktop states when layout changed.
- [ ] I followed `DESIGN.md` for visual changes.

## Notes

Add reviewer context, tradeoffs, follow-up work, or known limitations.
